ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fasteners" (
  "fastener_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fastener */,
  "nominal_dia" REAL /* Nominal diameter of the fastener in inches */,
  "applied_load" REAL /* Applied load in pounds */,
  "release_distance" REAL /* Release distance in inches */,
  "reactive_pressure" REAL /* Approximate reactive pressure in pounds */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section dimensions in inches */,
  "num_per_keg" INTEGER /* Approximate number of fasteners per keg */,
  "net_wt_per_1000" REAL /* Approximate net weight per 1000 fasteners */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product line */,
  "fastener_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the fastener type */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the material */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date when the fastener was manufactured */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the production */,
  "quality_status" TEXT /* Quality status of the fastener */,
  "production_cost" REAL /* Cost of production for the fastener */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications the fastener has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fastener_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fasteners_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fasteners_fastener_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fastener_type_id") REFERENCES fastener_types ("fastener_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fasteners_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product line was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the product line (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fastener_types" (
  "fastener_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fastener type */,
  "fastener_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fastener type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fastener type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the fastener type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the fastener type was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fastener type (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fastener_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the material was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the material was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the material (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "fastener_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fastener in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the fastener */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which a reorder should be triggered */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Default quantity to reorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_fastener_id FOREIGN KEY ("fastener_id") REFERENCES fasteners ("fastener_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, quality control specialist) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, deactivated) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Nominal diameter of the fastener in inches
Approximate number of fasteners per keg
Unique identifier for the product line
Unique identifier for the fastener type
Date when the fastener was manufactured
